zh.lifeSummary: 當Paul Thorfinnsson於大約1049年出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼時，他的父親Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney49歲，母親Ingebjørg Finnsdotter28歲。他於1072年之前與Thora Haakonsdatter在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1099年11月3日在挪威霍爾達藍德伯根享年51歲，埋葬在挪威霍爾達藍德伯根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Paul Thorfinnsson于大约1049年出生在英国苏格兰奧可尼时，他的父亲Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney49岁，母亲Ingebjørg Finnsdotter28岁。他于1072年之前与Thora Haakonsdatter在英国苏格兰奧可尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1099年11月3日在挪威霍爾達藍德伯根享年51岁，埋葬在挪威霍爾達藍德伯根。

nameMeanings.name: Paul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Paulus, a Roman family name, originally a nickname meaning ‘small’, used in the post-classical period as a given name. Pre-eminently this is the name of the saint who is generally regarded, with St Peter , as co-founder of the Christian Church. Born in Tarsus, and originally named Saul, he was both a Roman citizen and a Jew, and at first found employment as a minor official persecuting Christians. He was converted to Christianity by a vision of Christ while on the road to Damascus, and thereafter undertook extensive missionary journeys, converting people, especially Gentiles, to Christianity all over the eastern Mediterranean. His preaching aroused considerable official hostility, and eventually he was beheaded at Rome in about ad 65 . He is the author of the fourteen epistles to churches and individuals which form part of the New Testament. It has been in continuous use in the British Isles since the 16th century.

variants.name: Paulus
meanings: From Latin Paulus, a Roman family name, originally a nickname meaning ‘small’, used in the post-classical period as a given name. Pre-eminently this is the name of the saint who is generally regarded, with St Peter , as co-founder of the Christian Church. Born in Tarsus, and originally named Saul, he was both a Roman citizen and a Jew, and at first found employment as a minor official persecuting Christians. He was converted to Christianity by a vision of Christ while on the road to Damascus, and thereafter undertook extensive missionary journeys, converting people, especially Gentiles, to Christianity all over the eastern Mediterranean. His preaching aroused considerable official hostility, and eventually he was beheaded at Rome in about ad 65 . He is the author of the fourteen epistles to churches and individuals which form part of the New Testament. It has been in continuous use in the British Isles since the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Paul Thorfinnsson was born about 1049, in Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney, was 49 and his mother, Ingebjørg Finnsdotter, was 28. He married Thora Haakonsdatter before 1072, in Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 3 November 1099, in Bergen, Hordaland, Norway, at the age of 51, and was buried in Bergen, Hordaland, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Paul Thorfinnsson est né environ 1049, à Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Ingebjørg Finnsdotter, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Thora Haakonsdatter avant 1072, à Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1099, à Bergen, Hordaland, Norvège, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Bergen, Hordaland, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Paul Thorfinnsson um 1049 in Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney 49 und seine Mutter Ingebjørg Finnsdotter 28. Er hat vor 1072 in Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom Thora Haakonsdatter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. November 1099 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Bergen, Hordaland, Norwegen und wurde in Bergen, Hordaland, Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Paul Thorfinnsson è nato il circa 1049 nel Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Ingebjørg Finnsdotter, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Thora Haakonsdatter prima del 1072, nel Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 novembre 1099, nel Bergen, Hordaland, Norvegia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Bergen, Hordaland, Norvegia.

ja.lifeSummary: Paul Thorfinnssonが約1049年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーで生まれた時，父Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkneyは49歳，母Ingebjørg Finnsdotterは28歳であった。1072年以前にイギリススコットランドオルクニーでThora Haakonsdatterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1099年11月3日にノルウェーホールダランドバージェンで51歳で死去し，ノルウェーホールダランドバージェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Paul Thorfinnsson(이)가 대략 1049년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Ingebjørg Finnsdotter(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1072년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 르니에서 Thora Haakonsdatter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1099년 11월 3일 노르웨이 호르다랜드 버겐에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이 호르다랜드 버겐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Paul Thorfinnsson nasceu aproximadamente 1049, em Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Ingebjørg Finnsdotter, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Thora Haakonsdatter antes 1072, em Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1099, em Bergen, Hordaland, Noruega, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Bergen, Hordaland, Noruega.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Paul Thorfinnsson родился около 1049 г. в местности орни, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingebjørg Finnsdotter, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Thora Haakonsdatter перед 1072 г. в местности орни, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 ноября 1099 г. в местности биржен, хаурдаланд, Норвегия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности биржен, хаурдаланд, Норвегия.

sm.from 1064 to 1098: mai le 1064 e o'o I le 1098

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Paul Thorfinnsson nació aproximadamente 1049, en Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Ingebjørg Finnsdotter, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Thora Haakonsdatter antes de 1072, en Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1099, en Bergen, Hordaland, Noruega, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Bergen, Hordaland, Noruega.
